findings.description: The introductory paragraph states that basic services are provided to all customers who have purchased Nablarch (「ご購入いただいた全てのお客様に提供する基本サービス」) and that optional services are provided upon customer request at additional cost (「お客様のご要望により有償で提供する追加のオプショナルサービス」). The knowledge file omits the fact that basic services are included with purchase and provided to all purchasing customers. An AI would be unable to correctly answer questions about service eligibility (e.g., "Is the basic service free?" or "Who receives the basic service?").
findings.source_evidence: 「ご購入いただいた全てのお客様に提供する基本サービスと、お客様のご要望により有償で提供する追加のオプショナルサービスを用意しております。」
